title: User Registration with Valid Email and Password
description: Verify that a new user can successfully register with a valid email and password following the proper validation rules and receives email verification.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Input a valid email and a strong password that meets Zod validation rules
Submit the registration form
Verify registration is accepted without errors
Verify that a verification email is sent to the user
Complete the email verification using the link
Verify that the user account is activated and ready for login

title: User Registration with Invalid Email Formats
description: Verify registration fails when user provides invalid email formats, as validated by Zod schemas.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Input invalid emails (e.g., missing '@', missing domain, spaces) with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify registration is rejected and appropriate validation error messages are displayed

title: User Login with Correct Credentials
description: Verify that users can successfully log in using valid registered email and password, and receive JWT tokens.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input registered email and correct password
Submit the login form
Verify login succeeds and a valid JWT token is issued
Verify user is redirected to the dashboard or last visited page

title: User Login with Incorrect Credentials
description: Verify the system correctly handles login attempts with incorrect or unregistered credentials by rejecting access.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input unregistered email or incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify login fails and proper error messages are shown

title: Password Reset Flow
description: Verify users can request password reset emails and successfully reset their password using the emailed link.

steps.description: Navigate to the password reset request page
Submit a registered email for password reset
Verify password reset email is received
Open the password reset link and input a new valid password
Submit the new password
Verify password successfully updated and user can log in with the new password

title: Project Creation and Metadata Input
description: Verify users can create new projects with valid metadata and that the metadata is saved and retrievable.

steps.description: Log in to the platform
Navigate to project creation interface
Input project metadata including title, description, genre, and tags
Submit to create the project
Verify project is created and metadata is correctly saved and displayed

title: Chapter Creation Flow with AI Generation
description: Verify users can initiate chapter creation within a project, configure context, generate AI content between 1,000 and 5,000 words within 60 seconds, and save the chapter.

steps.description: Select an existing project
Start a new chapter creation
Set up chapter parameters and review AI context including character database and plot threads
Trigger AI generation of chapter content
Verify chapter content length is within 1,000 to 5,000 words
Verify AI generation completes within 60 seconds
Save the generated chapter
Verify chapter save is successful and content persists after reload

title: Chapter Regeneration and Iterative Editing
description: Verify users can regenerate AI generated chapter content iteratively, preserving narrative coherence and integrating context updates.

steps.description: Open an existing chapter with AI-generated content
Make edits and update chapter context
Trigger regeneration of the chapter content by AI
Verify regenerated chapter reflects edits and updated context
Verify narrative coherence and chapter length constraints are maintained (1,000-5,000 words)

title: Project Chapter Organization via Drag-and-Drop
description: Verify that users can reorder chapters within a project using drag-and-drop and the new order is saved immediately with version history updated.

steps.description: Open a project with multiple chapters
Drag and drop a chapter to a new position
Verify chapters reorder visually and order is saved
Verify version history logs the reorder event with timestamp

title: Version Control and History Retention for Chapters
description: Verify that versions of chapters are saved automatically and users can access versions retained for minimum 30 days.

steps.description: Open a chapter and edit content multiple times
Save changes triggering version snapshots
Verify version history entry is created for each save
Access older versions from the UI
Verify version data can be reviewed or restored and versions older than 30 days are still maintained

title: Export Project Chapters to DOCX, PDF, and TXT
description: Verify users can successfully export full projects or individual chapters into DOCX, PDF, and TXT formats within 30 seconds.

steps.description: Select a project or one/more chapters
Choose export format DOCX, PDF, or TXT
Trigger export
Verify export completes within 30 seconds
Verify exported files open correctly and content matches in-app content

title: Character and Plot Context Management
description: Verify users can create, edit, and delete character records and plot threads, and AI generation references updated context accurately.

steps.description: Access character database and create a new character with detailed attributes and relationships
Verify character is saved and properly displayed
Create or update plot threads and world-building elements
Verify plot and world information is saved and linked with characters
Generate or regenerate chapter content using AI with updated context
Verify AI references new or updated characters, relationships, and plot threads in the generated text

title: Editor Load Performance and Autosave
description: Verify chapter editor loads within 3 seconds and automatically saves draft content every 30 seconds.

steps.description: Open the editing interface for any chapter
Verify the editor UI fully loads within 3 seconds
Make text edits in the editor
Verify autosave is triggered automatically every 30 seconds and changes are persisted server-side

title: Editor Find and Replace Functionality
description: Verify the editor supports search and replace operations accurately within chapter text.

steps.description: Open the chapter editor with existing text
Use the Find feature to locate specific word or phrase
Verify all occurrences are correctly highlighted
Use the Replace feature to substitute specific words or phrases
Verify replacements are applied only where intended

title: Security: Password Hashing and JWT Token Validation
description: Verify passwords are hashed using bcryptjs and user sessions are managed via securely signed JWT tokens.

steps.description: Register a new user with password
Verify stored password in the database is hashed and not stored in plain text
Login with registered credentials
Verify a JWT token is issued with proper claims and signature
Use invalid or expired JWT token in API requests
Verify API denies access with proper unauthorized error response

title: Middleware Rate Limiting and CORS Enforcement
description: Verify the middleware correctly enforces rate limiting on API endpoints and CORS policy rejects unauthorized origins.

steps.description: Send multiple rapid requests exceeding rate limiting thresholds
Verify additional requests are rejected with rate limit error code
Send requests from origins not allowed by CORS policy
Verify requests are blocked with appropriate CORS error

title: GDPR/CCPA Compliance and Data Encryption
description: Verify user data storage uses AES-256 encryption and users can manage their data privacy settings according to GDPR/CCPA regulations.

steps.description: Create or update user data that is stored in the system
Verify sensitive user data is encrypted with AES-256 in the database
Request user data export or deletion via privacy management UI
Verify correct data is provided or deleted accordingly and confirmation is provided to the user

title: Health Check API Endpoint
description: Verify the health check API endpoint responds with system status and uptime information.

steps.description: Send a request to the health check API endpoint
Verify response includes current system status and uptime metrics

title: Freemium Conversion Rate Tracking and Retention Metrics
description: Verify system tracks and reports freemium to paid subscription conversion rates targeting 15-20%, and 90-day user retention above 70%.

steps.description: Simulate user signups, subscription upgrades, and user activity over 90 days
Verify system accurately reports conversion rate between 15% and 20%
Verify user retention at 90 days is at or above 70%
